entries.task: The working directory has been cleaned (uncommitted changes were stashed), the latest updates were pulled from `main`, and the new isolated feature branch `epic/system-guardrails` has been successfully created and checked out. Control has been returned to the Orchestrator, and the repository is ready for the Backend Architect to begin work on the System-Enforced Guardrails Epic.

entries.task: The user has approved the Kickoff Protocol for the "System-Enforced Guardrails" Epic. Please checkout a new isolated feature branch named `epic/system-guardrails`. Ensure `main` is clean, up-to-date, and free of uncommitted changes before branching. Report back when the branch is created and ready for the backend architect.
